name: Chicken and Sausage I
recipeIngredient: 1 pound Sweet Italian sausage, cut into 1-inch pieces
3 pounds Frying chicken, cut into serving pieces
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the potatoes in a large shallow baking pan.
2. Mix all of the seasonings together and sprinkle half on the potatoes.
3. Arrange the chicken and sausage pieces on top.
4. Pour the olive oil over the ingredients and sprinkle with the remaining seasonings.
5. Cover with foil and bake at 425 degrees Fahrenheit for 30 minutes.
6. Reduce the temperature to 375 degrees Fahrenheit, uncover, and continue baking for another 45 minutes until the chicken and sausage are browned.
